name: Curevan Digital TENS Unit - 12 Modes
description: Advanced Transcutaneous Electrical Nerve Stimulation (TENS) unit with 12 pre-programmed modes for targeted pain relief and muscle stimulation.
longDescription: Features a large LCD screen, rechargeable battery, and includes 4 electrode pads. Ideal for home use for chronic pain, arthritis, and post-injury recovery. Always use under the guidance of a qualified therapist.
